<!DOCTYPE html>

<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="utf-8"/>
<meta charset="utf-8">
<meta content="width=device-width,initial-scale=1.0" name="viewport"/>
<title>Maid4You Cleaning Services | South Florida</title>
<meta content="Professional, reliable and detailed house cleaning across Boca Raton, Delray Beach, Boynton Beach, Pompano Beach, Deerfield Beach, Coconut Creek, Parkland and Lighthouse Point." name="description"/>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com" rel="preconnect"/>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Libre+Baskerville:ital,wght@0,400;0,700;1,400&amp;family=DM+Sans:opsz,wght@9..40,300;9..40,400;9..40,500;9..40,600&amp;display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/>
<style>
:root{
  --cr:#9E1244;--cr-d:#7A0D34;--cr-l:#C01A55;
  --pink:#E0527F;--pink-l:#F2AABF;--pink-pale:#FDF0F5;
  --rose:#FFF8FB;--white:#fff;
  --text:#160810;--muted:#7A4558;--muted2:#B5879A;--border:#EDD5DF;
  --ff:"Libre Baskerville",Georgia,serif;
  --fb:"DM Sans",system-ui,sans-serif;
  --ease:cubic-bezier(.4,0,.2,1);
}
*,*::before,*::after{margin:0;padding:0;box-sizing:border-box}
html{scroll-behavior:smooth;overflow-x:hidden}
body{font-family:var(--fb);background:var(--white);color:var(--text);overflow-x:hidden;-webkit-font-smoothing:antialiased;font-weight:400}
img{max-width:100%;height:auto;display:block}
a{color:inherit;text-decoration:none;-webkit-tap-highlight-color:transparent}
button{font-family:var(--fb);cursor:pointer}

.rv{
  opacity:0;
  transform:translate3d(0,12px,0);
  transition:opacity .52s var(--ease),transform .52s var(--ease);
  will-change:opacity,transform;
  backface-visibility:hidden;
}
.rv.in{
  opacity:1;
  transform:translate3d(0,0,0);
}
.rv.d1{transition-delay:.06s}
.rv.d2{transition-delay:.12s}
.rv.d3{transition-delay:.18s}
.rv.d4{transition-delay:.24s}
.rv.d5{transition-delay:.30s}

@keyframes ru{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(18px)}to{opacity:1;transform:none}}
@keyframes fadeIn{from{opacity:0}to{opacity:1}}
@keyframes belt{0%{transform:translateX(0)}100%{transform:translateX(-50%)}}
@keyframes ping{0%{transform:scale(1);opacity:.8}70%{transform:scale(2.4);opacity:0}100%{opacity:0}}

/* ═══ NAV ═══ */
.nav{position:fixed;top:0;left:0;right:0;z-index:200;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;padding:0 64px;height:70px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.97);backdrop-filter:blur(20px);border-bottom:1px solid transparent;transition:border-color .3s,box-shadow .3s,height .3s,transform .42s var(--ease)}
.nav.sc{height:58px;border-color:var(--border);box-shadow:0 1px 20px rgba(158,18,68,.06)}
.nav.hd{transform:translateY(-100%)}
.nav-logo{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px}
.nav-logo-img{width:38px;height:38px;border-radius:50%;object-fit:cover;flex-shrink:0;box-shadow:0 2px 10px rgba(158,18,68,.18)}
.nav-logo-txt{display:flex;flex-direction:column;line-height:1.1}
.nav-logo-name{font-family:var(--ff);font-size:.98rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--cr);letter-spacing:-.2px}
.nav-logo-tag{font-size:.5rem;letter-spacing:2.5px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--muted2);font-weight:500;margin-top:2px}
.nav-links{position:absolute;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);display:flex;gap:40px;list-style:none}
.nav-links a{font-size:.59rem;letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;font-weight:500;color:var(--muted);transition:color .2s;position:relative;padding-bottom:3px}
.nav-links a::after{content:"";position:absolute;bottom:0;left:0;right:0;height:1px;background:var(--cr);transform:scaleX(0);transform-origin:left;transition:transform .25s var(--ease)}
.nav-links a:hover{color:var(--cr)}
.nav-links a:hover::after{transform:scaleX(1)}
.nav-cta{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;background:var(--cr);border:none;color:#fff;padding:10px 24px;border-radius:1px;font-size:.58rem;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;transition:all .22s;cursor:pointer;box-shadow:0 2px 14px rgba(158,18,68,.22)}
.nav-cta:hover{background:var(--cr-d);transform:translateY(-1px);box-shadow:0 5px 18px rgba(158,18,68,.3)}
.hbg{display:none;flex-direction:column;gap:5px;background:none;border:none;padding:6px;cursor:pointer;z-index:201}
.hbg span{display:block;width:21px;height:1.5px;background:var(--cr);transition:all .3s}
.hbg.on span:nth-child(1){transform:translateY(6.5px) rotate(45deg)}
.hbg.on span:nth-child(2){opacity:0;transform:scaleX(0)}
.hbg.on span:nth-child(3){transform:translateY(-6.5px) rotate(-45deg)}
.mob{position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:199;background:#fff;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:30px;opacity:0;pointer-events:none;transition:opacity .3s}
.mob.on{opacity:1;pointer-events:all}
.mob a{font-family:var(--ff);font-size:clamp(1.6rem,5vw,2rem);font-weight:400;color:var(--muted);transition:color .2s}
.mob a:hover{color:var(--cr)}
.mob-cta{background:var(--cr)!important;color:#fff!important;padding:13px 42px;font-family:var(--fb)!important;font-size:.59rem!important;letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;font-weight:600!important;margin-top:10px;border-radius:1px}

/* ═══ HERO ═══ */
.hero{position:relative;min-height:100vh;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;padding:100px 64px 80px;overflow:hidden;text-align:center}
.hero-bg{position:absolute;inset:0;background:#FEF5F9}
.hero-dots{position:absolute;inset:0;background-image:radial-gradient(rgba(158,18,68,.055) 1.2px,transparent 1.2px);background-size:32px 32px;mask-image:radial-gradient(ellipse 80% 80% at 50% 50%,black,transparent);pointer-events:none}
.hero-glow-l{position:absolute;left:-15%;top:5%;width:55%;height:70%;border-radius:50%;background:radial-gradient(ellipse,rgba(224,82,127,.1) 0%,transparent 68%);pointer-events:none}
.hero-glow-r{position:absolute;right:-10%;bottom:0;width:45%;height:65%;border-radius:50%;background:radial-gradient(ellipse,rgba(158,18,68,.07) 0%,transparent 68%);pointer-events:none}
.hero-inner{position:relative;z-index:2;max-width:800px;width:100%}
.hero-eyebrow{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:14px;font-size:.56rem;letter-spacing:4px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--pink);font-weight:500;margin-bottom:24px;opacity:0;animation:ru .7s .12s forwards}
.hero-eyebrow::before,.hero-eyebrow::after{content:"";display:block;width:28px;height:1px;background:var(--pink-l)}
h1.hero-title{font-family:var(--ff);font-size:clamp(3.4rem,7.5vw,6.8rem);font-weight:400;line-height:.92;letter-spacing:-2.5px;color:var(--text);opacity:0;animation:ru .9s .28s forwards}
h1.hero-title em{display:block;font-style:italic;color:var(--cr);margin-top:8px}
.hero-rule{width:38px;height:1px;background:var(--pink-l);margin:30px auto;opacity:0;animation:fadeIn .6s .5s forwards}
.hero-sub{font-size:clamp(.9rem,1.5vw,1.05rem);color:var(--muted);font-weight:300;line-height:1.9;max-width:520px;margin:0 auto 52px;opacity:0;animation:ru .8s .62s forwards}
.hero-btns{display:flex;gap:14px;flex-wrap:wrap;justify-content:center;opacity:0;animation:ru .8s .76s forwards}
.btn-p{background:var(--cr);color:#fff;padding:15px 42px;border:none;border-radius:1px;font-size:.62rem;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;transition:all .22s;cursor:pointer;box-shadow:0 4px 22px rgba(158,18,68,.28)}
.btn-p:hover{background:var(--cr-d);transform:translateY(-2px);box-shadow:0 8px 30px rgba(158,18,68,.36)}
.btn-p svg,.btn-o svg{transition:transform .2s}
.btn-p:hover svg{transform:translateX(4px)}
.btn-o{background:transparent;color:var(--cr);padding:15px 42px;border:1px solid rgba(158,18,68,.28);border-radius:1px;font-size:.62rem;font-weight:500;letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;transition:all .22s;cursor:pointer;display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:10px}
.btn-o:hover{background:var(--pink-pale);border-color:var(--cr)}
.btn-o:hover svg{transform:translateX(3px)}
.hero-scroll{position:absolute;bottom:28px;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:7px;opacity:0;animation:fadeIn 1s 1.3s forwards}
.hero-scroll-line{width:1px;height:36px;background:linear-gradient(to bottom,var(--border),transparent)}
.hero-scroll-txt{font-size:.5rem;letter-spacing:3px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--muted2);font-weight:500}

/* ═══ TRUST BAR ═══ */
.trust{background:var(--cr);height:50px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;padding:0 64px}
.ti{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;padding:0 26px;font-size:.56rem;letter-spacing:2.5px;text-transform:uppercase;color:rgba(255,255,255,.78);white-space:nowrap;font-weight:500}
.ti svg{color:rgba(255,255,255,.45);flex-shrink:0}
.tsep{width:1px;height:14px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.14);flex-shrink:0}

/* ═══ TICKER ═══ */
.ticker{overflow:hidden;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);padding:11px 0;background:var(--rose)}
.tbelt{display:flex;width:max-content;animation:belt 34s linear infinite}
.titem{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:40px;padding:0 40px;white-space:nowrap;font-size:.57rem;letter-spacing:3px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--muted2);font-weight:500}
.tdot{width:4px;height:4px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--pink-l);flex-shrink:0}

/* ═══ SHARED ═══ */
.sec{padding:96px 72px}
.sec-eye{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;font-size:.56rem;letter-spacing:3.5px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--pink);font-weight:500;margin-bottom:16px}
.sec-eye::before{content:"";display:block;width:18px;height:1px;background:var(--pink-l)}
h2.st{font-family:var(--ff);font-size:clamp(2.2rem,4.2vw,3.4rem);font-weight:400;line-height:1.08;letter-spacing:-1px;color:var(--text)}
h2.st em{font-style:italic;color:var(--cr)}
p.ss{font-size:.88rem;color:var(--muted);font-weight:300;line-height:1.9;max-width:460px;margin-top:14px}

/* ═══ HOW IT WORKS ═══ */
#how{background:var(--white)}
.how-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);margin-top:52px;border:1px solid var(--border)}
.hstep{padding:42px 36px;background:var(--white);transition:background .3s;position:relative}
.hstep:not(:last-child){border-right:1px solid var(--border)}
.hstep:hover{background:var(--rose)}
.hstep-num{font-family:var(--ff);font-size:4.5rem;font-weight:400;font-style:italic;color:rgba(237,213,223,.65);line-height:1;margin-bottom:20px;transition:color .3s}
.hstep:hover .hstep-num{color:var(--pink-l)}
.hstep-ico{width:44px;height:44px;border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:50%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:var(--cr);margin-bottom:16px;transition:all .3s}
.hstep:hover .hstep-ico{background:var(--cr);border-color:var(--cr);color:#fff}
.hstep-name{font-family:var(--ff);font-size:1.1rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--text);margin-bottom:10px;line-height:1.2}
.hstep-desc{font-size:.79rem;color:var(--muted);font-weight:300;line-height:1.82}

/* ═══ SERVICES ═══ */
#services{background:var(--rose)}
.sgrid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);margin-top:52px;background:var(--border);gap:1px;border:1px solid var(--border)}
.scard{background:var(--white);padding:36px 30px;position:relative;overflow:hidden;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:11px;transition:background .3s}
.scard:hover{background:var(--pink-pale)}
.scard-bar{position:absolute;top:0;left:0;right:0;height:2px;background:linear-gradient(to right,var(--cr),var(--pink));transform:scaleX(0);transform-origin:left;transition:transform .38s var(--ease)}
.scard:hover .scard-bar{transform:scaleX(1)}
.scard-lbl{font-size:.54rem;font-weight:500;letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--muted2)}
.sico{width:42px;height:42px;border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:50%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:var(--cr);transition:all .3s;flex-shrink:0}
.scard:hover .sico{background:var(--cr);border-color:var(--cr);color:#fff}
.snm{font-family:var(--ff);font-size:1.12rem;font-weight:700;line-height:1.15;color:var(--text)}
.sds{font-size:.79rem;color:var(--muted);font-weight:300;line-height:1.82;flex:1}
.stag{font-size:.54rem;letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--pink);font-weight:500}

/* ═══ WHY — icon sem fundo + lista ═══ */
#why{background:var(--white);display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:96px;padding:96px 72px;align-items:center}
.why-vis{display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:flex-start;gap:32px}
.why-icon-wrap{background:var(--pink-pale);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:4px;padding:40px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;width:100%}
.why-vacuum{width:100%;max-width:280px;height:auto;display:block;margin:0 auto;filter:drop-shadow(0 4px 18px rgba(158,18,68,.12))}
.why-badge-row{display:flex;gap:12px;width:100%}
.why-badge{flex:1;background:var(--cr);color:#fff;padding:18px 20px;border-radius:2px;text-align:center}
.why-badge-n{font-family:var(--ff);font-size:1.9rem;font-weight:400;line-height:1;font-style:italic;color:#fff}
.why-badge-l{font-size:.5rem;letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;opacity:.6;margin-top:5px;font-weight:500;line-height:1.5}
.why-list{list-style:none;display:flex;flex-direction:column;margin-top:36px;border-top:1px solid var(--border)}
.why-item{display:flex;gap:18px;align-items:flex-start;padding:18px 0;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);transition:padding-left .2s}
.why-item:hover{padding-left:6px}
.wnum{font-family:var(--ff);font-size:.95rem;font-weight:400;color:var(--pink-l);font-style:italic;line-height:1.2;flex-shrink:0;width:22px}
.wtxt strong{display:block;font-size:.82rem;font-weight:600;color:var(--text);margin-bottom:3px}
.wtxt span{font-size:.76rem;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.75;font-weight:300}

/* ═══ STATS ═══ */
.stats{background:var(--cr);padding:68px 72px;display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);text-align:center;position:relative;overflow:hidden}
.stats::before{content:"";position:absolute;top:-60%;right:-10%;width:50%;height:170%;border-radius:50%;background:rgba(255,255,255,.03);pointer-events:none}
.stat-i{position:relative;padding:8px}
.stat-i+.stat-i::before{content:"";position:absolute;left:0;top:18%;bottom:18%;width:1px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.11)}
.stat-n{font-family:var(--ff);font-size:clamp(2.8rem,5vw,4.2rem);font-weight:400;font-style:italic;color:#fff;line-height:1;margin-bottom:12px}
.stat-l{font-size:.54rem;letter-spacing:3px;text-transform:uppercase;color:rgba(255,255,255,.45);font-weight:500;line-height:1.8}

/* ═══ REVIEWS ═══ */
#reviews{background:var(--white);padding:96px 72px}
.tgrid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);margin-top:52px;background:var(--border);gap:1px;border:1px solid var(--border)}
.tcard{background:var(--white);padding:32px 26px;position:relative;overflow:hidden;transition:background .3s}
.tcard:hover{background:var(--rose)}
.tqq{position:absolute;top:14px;right:18px;font-family:var(--ff);font-size:6rem;font-weight:400;color:rgba(224,82,127,.07);line-height:1;pointer-events:none;user-select:none}
.t-stars{color:var(--pink);letter-spacing:1px;margin-bottom:14px;font-size:.84rem}
.t-text{font-size:.83rem;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.87;font-weight:300;font-style:italic;margin-bottom:20px}
.t-author{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;border-top:1px solid var(--border);padding-top:14px}
.t-av{width:36px;height:36px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--pink-pale);border:1px solid var(--border);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:var(--cr);font-family:var(--ff);font-size:.82rem;font-weight:700;flex-shrink:0}
.t-name{font-weight:600;font-size:.8rem;color:var(--text)}
.t-loc{font-size:.66rem;color:var(--muted2);margin-top:1px;font-weight:300}

/* ═══ AREAS — cidades no grid compacto ═══ */
#areas{background:var(--rose);padding:96px 72px}
.areas-inner{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:96px;align-items:start}
.cities-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;margin-top:36px;border:1px solid var(--border)}
.city{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:11px;padding:13px 16px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);transition:background .2s;cursor:default}
.city:nth-child(odd){border-right:1px solid var(--border)}
.city:nth-last-child(-n+2){border-bottom:none}
.city:hover{background:var(--pink-pale)}
.city-dot{width:5px;height:5px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--pink);flex-shrink:0}
.city-name{font-size:.8rem;font-weight:500;color:var(--text)}
/* Cidades compactas NO LUGAR do mapa */
.cities-compact-box{background:var(--white);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:2px;padding:36px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:0}
.cities-compact-title{font-size:.56rem;letter-spacing:3px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--muted2);font-weight:500;margin-bottom:20px;padding-bottom:12px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border)}
.city-compact{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:11px;padding:11px 0;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);transition:padding-left .2s}
.city-compact:hover{padding-left:6px}
.city-compact:last-child{border-bottom:none}
.city-compact .city-dot{background:var(--pink)}
.city-compact-name{font-size:.82rem;font-weight:500;color:var(--text)}
.area-note{font-size:.74rem;color:var(--muted2);font-weight:300;margin-top:18px;padding-top:16px;border-top:1px solid var(--border);font-style:italic}

/* ═══ CTA ═══ */
.cta-sec{background:var(--text);padding:100px 72px;text-align:center;position:relative;overflow:hidden}
.cta-glow{position:absolute;top:50%;left:50%;transform:translate(-50%,-50%);width:60%;height:200%;border-radius:50%;background:radial-gradient(ellipse,rgba(158,18,68,.13) 0%,transparent 65%);pointer-events:none}
.cta-inner{position:relative;z-index:1;max-width:600px;margin:0 auto}
.cta-eye{font-size:.55rem;letter-spacing:3.5px;text-transform:uppercase;color:rgba(255,255,255,.3);font-weight:500;margin-bottom:20px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:14px}
.cta-eye::before,.cta-eye::after{content:"";display:block;width:18px;height:1px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.14)}
.cta-title{font-family:var(--ff);font-size:clamp(2.2rem,4.5vw,3.4rem);font-weight:400;color:#fff;line-height:1.08;letter-spacing:-1px;margin-bottom:14px}
.cta-title em{font-style:italic;color:var(--pink-l)}
.cta-sub{font-size:.88rem;color:rgba(255,255,255,.4);font-weight:300;line-height:1.9;margin-bottom:48px}
.cta-btns{display:flex;gap:14px;justify-content:center;flex-wrap:wrap}
.btn-w{background:#fff;color:var(--cr);padding:15px 44px;border:none;border-radius:1px;font-size:.62rem;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;transition:all .22s;cursor:pointer;box-shadow:0 4px 22px rgba(0,0,0,.14)}
.btn-w:hover{background:var(--pink-pale);transform:translateY(-2px);box-shadow:0 8px 30px rgba(0,0,0,.18)}
.btn-w svg,.btn-wl svg{transition:transform .2s}
.btn-w:hover svg{transform:translateX(4px)}
.btn-wl{background:transparent;color:rgba(255,255,255,.6);padding:15px 44px;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.15);border-radius:1px;font-size:.62rem;font-weight:500;letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase;transition:all .22s;cursor:pointer;display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:8px}
.btn-wl:hover{border-color:rgba(255,255,255,.4);color:#fff}

/* ═══ FOOTER enxuto ═══ */
footer{background:var(--text);border-top:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.055);padding:56px 72px 32px}
.foot-inner{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1.8fr 1fr;gap:64px;margin-bottom:40px;align-items:start}
.foot-brand{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;margin-bottom:14px}
.foot-brand img{width:36px;height:36px;border-radius:50%;object-fit:cover}
.foot-brand-name{font-family:var(--ff);font-size:.96rem;font-weight:700;color:#fff}
.foot-desc{font-size:.77rem;color:rgba(255,255,255,.36);line-height:1.88;max-width:300px;font-weight:300;margin-bottom:10px}
.foot-slogan{font-family:var(--ff);font-size:.82rem;font-style:italic;color:rgba(255,255,255,.2)}
.foot-contact-col .fcol-ttl{font-size:.54rem;letter-spacing:3px;text-transform:uppercase;font-weight:500;color:rgba(255,255,255,.27);margin-bottom:18px}
.foot-contact-list{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:10px}
.foot-contact-list a{font-size:.78rem;color:rgba(255,255,255,.42);transition:color .2s;font-weight:300}
.foot-contact-list a:hover{color:#fff}
.foot-bottom{border-top:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.055);padding-top:22px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;font-size:.65rem;color:rgba(255,255,255,.2)}
.foot-policies{display:flex;gap:20px}
.foot-policies a{color:rgba(255,255,255,.2);transition:color .2s}
.foot-policies a:hover{color:rgba(255,255,255,.6)}

/* ═══ RESPONSIVE ═══ */
@media(max-width:1100px){
  .sgrid,.tgrid,.how-grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr)}
  .how-grid .hstep:nth-child(2){border-right:none;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border)}
  #why{grid-template-columns:1fr;gap:48px;padding:72px 40px}
  .stats{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr)}
  .stat-i::before{display:none!important}
  .areas-inner{grid-template-columns:1fr}
  .foot-inner{grid-template-columns:1fr}
}
@media(max-width:768px){
  .nav{padding:0 20px;height:62px}
  .nav-links,.nav-cta{display:none}
  .hbg{display:flex}
  .hero{padding:88px 20px 70px}
  .sec,.cta-sec,#why,#areas,#reviews{padding:60px 20px}
  .trust{height:auto;padding:8px 20px;flex-wrap:wrap}
  .ti{padding:5px 10px}
  .tsep{display:none}
  .sgrid,.tgrid,.how-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;gap:0}
  .hstep:not(:last-child){border-right:none;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border)}
  .stats{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr);padding:40px 20px}
  .cities-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}
  .city:nth-child(odd){border-right:none}
  .city:nth-last-child(-n+2){border-bottom:1px solid var(--border)}
  .city:last-child{border-bottom:none}
  footer{padding:44px 20px 24px}
  .foot-bottom{flex-direction:column;gap:10px;text-align:center}
  .foot-policies{justify-content:center}
}
@media(max-width:480px){
  .hero-btns,.cta-btns{flex-direction:column;align-items:stretch}
  .btn-p,.btn-o,.btn-w,.btn-wl{justify-content:center}
}

/* === UX / responsiveness enhancements === */
.why-logo-panel{
  width:100%;
  aspect-ratio:4/3;
  min-height:auto;
  border-radius:34px;
  overflow:hidden;
  background:linear-gradient(135deg,#d4006f 0%,#ec1680 100%);
  box-shadow:0 28px 70px rgba(143,16,76,.16);
  display:flex;
  align-items:center;
  justify-content:center;
  padding:22px;
}
.why-brand-logo{
  width:100%;
  height:100%;
  display:block;
  object-fit:contain;
  border-radius:24px;
  box-shadow:0 18px 42px rgba(75,0,35,.14);
}
.why-badge-n,.stat-n{will-change:auto}
#areas{background:linear-gradient(180deg,#fff8fb 0%,#fff 100%)}
.areas-layout{
  display:grid;
  grid-template-columns:minmax(0,.8fr) minmax(320px,1.2fr);
  gap:32px;
  align-items:start;
}
.areas-copy{padding-right:8px}
.areas-panel{
  background:#fff;
  border:1px solid rgba(198,95,136,.16);
  border-radius:28px;
  padding:28px;
  box-shadow:0 20px 45px rgba(38,25,33,.06);
}
.areas-panel-head{margin-bottom:22px}
.areas-panel-kicker{
  display:inline-flex;
  align-items:center;
  gap:8px;
  padding:8px 14px;
  border-radius:999px;
  background:#fff1f7;
  color:#b53872;
  font-size:12px;
  letter-spacing:.14em;
  text-transform:uppercase;
  font-weight:700;
  margin-bottom:14px;
}
.areas-panel-title{
  margin:0 0 10px;
  font:700 clamp(24px,2.3vw,34px)/1.15 var(--ff);
  color:var(--ink);
}
.areas-panel-copy{
  margin:0;
  color:var(--muted);
  line-height:1.7;
}
.areas-chip-grid{
  display:grid;
  grid-template-columns:repeat(2,minmax(0,1fr));
  gap:14px;
}
.area-chip{
  display:flex;
  align-items:center;
  gap:12px;
  padding:15px 16px;
  border-radius:18px;
  background:#fff8fb;
  border:1px solid rgba(198,95,136,.14);
  color:var(--ink);
  font-weight:600;
  transition:transform .28s var(--ease),box-shadow .28s var(--ease),border-color .28s var(--ease);
}
.area-chip:hover{
  transform:translateY(-3px);
  box-shadow:0 12px 24px rgba(198,95,136,.10);
  border-color:rgba(198,95,136,.28);
}
.areas-panel-foot{
  margin-top:22px;
  padding-top:18px;
  border-top:1px solid rgba(198,95,136,.12);
  display:flex;
  align-items:center;
  justify-content:space-between;
  gap:16px;
  flex-wrap:wrap;
}
.areas-note-badge{
  display:inline-flex;
  align-items:center;
  padding:9px 14px;
  border-radius:999px;
  background:#25161d;
  color:#fff;
  font-size:12px;
  letter-spacing:.1em;
  text-transform:uppercase;
}
.areas-panel-foot .area-note{
  margin:0;
  color:var(--muted);
}
@media (max-width:980px){
  .areas-layout{grid-template-columns:1fr}
}
@media (max-width:720px){
  .areas-panel{padding:20px}
  .areas-chip-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}
  .areas-panel-foot{align-items:flex-start}
  .why-logo-panel{aspect-ratio:4/3; min-height:auto; border-radius:24px; padding:10px}
  .why-brand-logo{border-radius:18px}
}


/* === Final strategic refinements: desktop + mobile === */
#why{
  align-items:center;
}
.why-vis{
  align-self:center;
}
.why-badge-row{
  margin-top:22px;
  gap:14px;
}
.why-badge{
  border-radius:0;
  min-height:96px;
}
.why-badge-n{
  line-height:1;
}
@media (min-width:981px){
  #why{
    grid-template-columns:minmax(420px,.95fr) minmax(520px,1.05fr);
    gap:clamp(52px,5vw,86px);
  }
  .why-logo-panel{
    max-width:720px;
    margin-inline:auto;
  }
}
@media (max-width:980px){
  #why{
    gap:42px;
  }
  .why-vis{
    max-width:720px;
    margin-inline:auto;
  }
}
@media (max-width:720px){
  #why{
    padding-top:68px;
    padding-bottom:68px;
  }
  .why-badge-row{
    grid-template-columns:1fr;
    margin-top:14px;
  }
  .why-badge{
    min-height:84px;
  }
}
@media (max-width:420px){
  .why-logo-panel{
    padding:8px;
    border-radius:20px;
  }
  .why-brand-logo{
    border-radius:14px;
  }
}


/* === Reveal corrigido: mantém o efeito sem buracos visuais === */
@media (max-width:720px){
  .rv{
    transform:translate3d(0,8px,0);
    transition-duration:.42s;
  }
  .rv.d1{transition-delay:.04s}
  .rv.d2{transition-delay:.08s}
  .rv.d3{transition-delay:.12s}
  .rv.d4{transition-delay:.16s}
  .rv.d5{transition-delay:.20s}
}
@media (prefers-reduced-motion:reduce){
  .rv,
  .rv.in{
    opacity:1!important;
    transform:none!important;
    transition:none!important;
  }
}
section[id]{
  scroll-margin-top:110px;
}
@media (max-width:720px){
  section[id]{
    scroll-margin-top:88px;
  }
}


/* === KATIA REQUEST FINAL POLISH — Home clara, contato imediato e legibilidade === */
.nav{height:76px;padding:0 clamp(22px,4.4vw,72px)}
.nav.sc{height:66px}
.nav-logo-img{width:46px;height:46px}
.nav-logo-name{font-size:1.18rem;letter-spacing:-.15px}
.nav-logo-tag{font-size:.62rem;letter-spacing:2.7px;color:var(--muted)}
.nav-links{gap:clamp(26px,3vw,44px)}
.nav-links a{font-size:.70rem;letter-spacing:2.25px;font-weight:700}
.nav-cta{padding:12px 26px;font-size:.68rem;letter-spacing:2.2px;border-radius:999px}

.hero-v2{min-height:100vh;padding:112px clamp(22px,5vw,76px) 74px;text-align:left;justify-content:center;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#fff8fb 0%,#fff 52%,#fff1f7 100%)}
.hero-photo-bg{background:radial-gradient(circle at 14% 18%,rgba(224,82,127,.11),transparent 28%),radial-gradient(circle at 88% 70%,rgba(158,18,68,.09),transparent 30%),linear-gradient(135deg,#fff8fb 0%,#fff 48%,#fff1f7 100%)}
.hero-v2-grid{position:relative;z-index:2;width:min(1220px,100%);display:grid;grid-template-columns:minmax(0,.92fr) minmax(420px,1.08fr);gap:clamp(34px,5vw,76px);align-items:center}
.hero-v2-copy{max-width:610px}
.hero-v2 .hero-eyebrow{opacity:1;animation:none;margin-bottom:18px;color:var(--cr);font-size:.73rem;letter-spacing:3.2px;font-weight:800}
.hero-v2 .hero-eyebrow::before,.hero-v2 .hero-eyebrow::after{width:22px;background:var(--pink)}
.hero-v2 .hero-title{opacity:1;animation:none;font-size:clamp(3.25rem,6.5vw,6.75rem);line-height:.93;letter-spacing:-2.8px}
.hero-v2 .hero-title em{color:var(--cr)}
.hero-v2-sub{opacity:1;animation:none;margin:24px 0 26px;max-width:540px;font-size:clamp(1rem,1.35vw,1.16rem);line-height:1.75;color:#6f394e}
.hero-phone-card{width:min(470px,100%);background:rgba(255,255,255,.88);border:1px solid rgba(158,18,68,.18);border-radius:28px;padding:20px 22px;box-shadow:0 18px 46px rgba(158,18,68,.10);margin:0 0 22px;backdrop-filter:blur(14px)}
.hero-phone-kicker{display:block;font-size:.72rem;letter-spacing:2.8px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--pink);font-weight:800;margin-bottom:7px}
.hero-phone-number{display:inline-flex;color:var(--cr);font-family:var(--ff);font-size:clamp(1.85rem,3vw,2.95rem);line-height:1.02;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:-1px}
.hero-phone-note{display:block;margin-top:8px;color:var(--muted);font-size:.88rem;line-height:1.5}
.hero-v2-btns{opacity:1;animation:none;justify-content:flex-start;gap:13px}
.hero-v2 .btn-p,.hero-v2 .btn-o{min-height:56px;padding:17px 30px;font-size:.72rem;letter-spacing:2.1px;border-radius:999px}
.hero-v2 .btn-main-quote{box-shadow:0 12px 32px rgba(158,18,68,.28)}
.hero-v2 .btn-text-now{background:#fff;border-color:rgba(158,18,68,.28);box-shadow:0 12px 26px rgba(158,18,68,.08)}
.hero-kitchen-frame{position:relative;min-height:clamp(440px,58vh,690px);border-radius:42px;overflow:hidden;background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(255,255,255,.5),rgba(253,240,245,.8)),#fff;box-shadow:0 28px 80px rgba(49,20,34,.16);border:1px solid rgba(158,18,68,.12)}
.hero-kitchen-photo{position:absolute;inset:0;background-image:linear-gradient(90deg,rgba(255,248,251,.35) 0%,rgba(255,255,255,.05) 42%,rgba(255,255,255,.22) 100%),url('https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1556912172-45b7abe8b7e1?auto=format&fit=crop&w=1600&q=82');background-size:cover;background-position:center;transform:scale(1.015)}
.hero-kitchen-frame::after{content:"";position:absolute;inset:0;background:linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(255,255,255,.03),rgba(158,18,68,.06));pointer-events:none}
.hero-kitchen-badge{position:absolute;left:24px;right:24px;bottom:24px;z-index:2;background:rgba(255,255,255,.92);border:1px solid rgba(158,18,68,.16);border-radius:24px;padding:18px 20px;box-shadow:0 18px 48px rgba(49,20,34,.16);backdrop-filter:blur(14px)}
.hero-kitchen-badge span{display:block;font-size:.68rem;color:var(--pink);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:2.5px;font-weight:800;margin-bottom:4px}
.hero-kitchen-badge strong{display:block;font-family:var(--ff);color:var(--text);font-size:clamp(1.25rem,2vw,1.75rem);line-height:1.12}
.hero-v2 .hero-scroll{left:clamp(28px,5vw,72px);transform:none}

.cta-phone{margin:0 auto 28px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:6px}
.cta-phone span{font-size:.66rem;letter-spacing:3px;text-transform:uppercase;color:rgba(255,255,255,.42);font-weight:800}
.cta-phone a{color:#fff;font-family:var(--ff);font-size:clamp(2rem,4vw,3.35rem);line-height:1;font-weight:700}

footer{padding:68px clamp(22px,5vw,78px) 34px}
.foot-inner{grid-template-columns:1.5fr 1fr;gap:clamp(42px,6vw,90px)}
.foot-brand img{width:54px;height:54px}
.foot-brand-name{font-size:1.48rem}
.foot-brand-tag{color:rgba(255,255,255,.36);font-size:.72rem;letter-spacing:2.8px;text-transform:uppercase;margin-top:3px}
.foot-desc{font-size:.96rem;max-width:420px}
.foot-slogan{font-size:1.05rem}
.foot-contact-col .fcol-ttl{font-size:.72rem;color:rgba(255,255,255,.42)}
.foot-contact-list{gap:13px}
.foot-contact-list a{font-size:1rem;color:rgba(255,255,255,.58)}
.foot-contact-list .foot-phone{font-family:var(--ff);font-size:clamp(1.65rem,2.8vw,2.35rem);line-height:1.04;color:#fff}
.foot-contact-list .foot-text{color:var(--pink-l);font-weight:700}
.foot-bottom{font-size:.78rem}

.hero-phone-card,.hero-kitchen-frame,.area-chip,.tcard,.scard,.why-item{transform:translateZ(0)}
.hero-phone-card:hover,.hero-kitchen-frame:hover{transform:translate3d(0,-3px,0);transition:transform .28s var(--ease),box-shadow .28s var(--ease)}

@media(max-width:1100px){
  .hero-v2-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}
  .hero-v2-copy{max-width:760px}
  .hero-kitchen-frame{min-height:460px}
}
@media(max-width:768px){
  .nav{height:68px;padding:0 18px}
  .nav-logo-img{width:42px;height:42px}
  .nav-logo-name{font-size:1.08rem}
  .nav-logo-tag{font-size:.56rem;letter-spacing:2.2px}
  .hero-v2{padding:92px 18px 66px;text-align:left;min-height:auto}
  .hero-v2-grid{gap:26px}
  .hero-v2 .hero-eyebrow{font-size:.62rem;letter-spacing:2.3px;margin-bottom:15px}
  .hero-v2 .hero-eyebrow::after{display:none}
  .hero-v2 .hero-title{font-size:clamp(3rem,14vw,4.2rem);letter-spacing:-1.8px}
  .hero-v2-sub{font-size:1rem;margin:20px 0 22px}
  .hero-phone-card{border-radius:22px;padding:17px 18px}
  .hero-phone-number{font-size:clamp(1.95rem,9vw,2.55rem)}
  .hero-v2-btns{flex-direction:column;align-items:stretch}
  .hero-v2 .btn-p,.hero-v2 .btn-o{width:100%;justify-content:center;min-height:56px}
  .hero-kitchen-frame{min-height:360px;border-radius:28px}
  .hero-kitchen-badge{left:14px;right:14px;bottom:14px;border-radius:18px;padding:15px}
  .ti{font-size:.62rem;letter-spacing:2px}
  .foot-inner{grid-template-columns:1fr}
  .foot-contact-list .foot-phone{font-size:2rem}
}
@media(max-width:480px){
  .hero-v2{padding-top:88px}
  .hero-phone-note{font-size:.82rem}
  .hero-kitchen-frame{min-height:310px}
  .hero-kitchen-photo{background-position:center}
  .cta-phone a{font-size:2rem}
}


/* === Strategic Free In-Home Estimate Section === */
.free-estimate-sec{
  position:relative;
  padding:96px 72px;
  background:
    radial-gradient(circle at 12% 20%,rgba(224,82,127,.10),transparent 28%),
    linear-gradient(180deg,#fff 0%,#fff8fb 100%);
  overflow:hidden;
}
.free-estimate-sec::before{
  content:"";
  position:absolute;
  inset:auto -8% -38% auto;
  width:44%;
  height:88%;
  border-radius:50%;
  background:rgba(158,18,68,.055);
  pointer-events:none;
}
.free-estimate-wrap{
  position:relative;
  z-index:1;
  display:grid;
  grid-template-columns:minmax(0,1fr) minmax(360px,.9fr);
  gap:clamp(34px,5vw,76px);
  align-items:center;
  max-width:1180px;
  margin:0 auto;
}
.free-estimate-copy .ss{
  max-width:560px;
}
.free-estimate-note{
  margin-top:18px;
  max-width:560px;
  font-size:.92rem;
  line-height:1.8;
  color:#6f394e;
  font-weight:400;
  background:rgba(255,255,255,.72);
  border-left:3px solid var(--pink);
  padding:14px 18px;
}
.free-estimate-actions{
  display:flex;
  flex-wrap:wrap;
  gap:13px;
  margin-top:28px;
}
.free-estimate-actions .btn-p,
.free-estimate-actions .btn-o{
  border-radius:999px;
  min-height:54px;
}
.free-estimate-card{
  background:#fff;
  border:1px solid rgba(158,18,68,.14);
  border-radius:32px;
  padding:30px;
  box-shadow:0 24px 70px rgba(49,20,34,.10);
}
.estimate-card-badge{
  display:inline-flex;
  align-items:center;
  padding:9px 14px;
  border-radius:999px;
  background:#fff1f7;
  color:#b53872;
  font-size:.68rem;
  letter-spacing:.16em;
  text-transform:uppercase;
  font-weight:800;
  margin-bottom:18px;
}
.estimate-step{
  display:flex;
  gap:16px;
  padding:20px 0;
  border-top:1px solid rgba(158,18,68,.11);
}
.estimate-step:first-of-type{
  border-top:none;
}
.estimate-step span{
  font-family:var(--ff);
  font-size:1.55rem;
  font-style:italic;
  color:var(--pink);
  min-width:38px;
  line-height:1;
}
.estimate-step strong{
  display:block;
  font-size:.98rem;
  color:var(--text);
  margin-bottom:6px;
}
.estimate-step p{
  margin:0;
  color:var(--muted);
  font-size:.86rem;
  line-height:1.65;
  font-weight:300;
}
@media(max-width:980px){
  .free-estimate-sec{
    padding:72px 40px;
  }
  .free-estimate-wrap{
    grid-template-columns:1fr;
  }
}
@media(max-width:720px){
  .free-estimate-sec{
    padding:62px 20px;
  }
  .free-estimate-card{
    padding:22px;
    border-radius:24px;
  }
  .free-estimate-actions{
    flex-direction:column;
  }
  .free-estimate-actions .btn-p,
  .free-estimate-actions .btn-o{
    width:100%;
    justify-content:center;
  }
  .estimate-step{
    gap:12px;
  }
}


/* === PREMIUM DESKTOP + MOBILE EXPERIENCE LAYER === */

/* Base polish */
body{
  text-rendering:optimizeLegibility;
}
::selection{
  background:rgba(224,82,127,.22);
  color:var(--cr-d);
}
a,
button,
.btn-p,
.btn-o,
.btn-w,
.btn-wl,
.nav-cta{
  -webkit-tap-highlight-color:transparent;
}

/* Desktop visual rhythm */
@media(min-width:1101px){
  .hero-v2-grid{
    min-height:calc(100vh - 168px);
  }
  .hero-v2-copy{
    padding-top:12px;
  }
  .hero-kitchen-frame{
    transform:translateZ(0);
  }
  .hero-kitchen-photo{
    transition:transform .8s var(--ease), filter .8s var(--ease);
  }
  .hero-kitchen-frame:hover .hero-kitchen-photo{
    transform:scale(1.035);
    filter:saturate(1.04) contrast(1.02);
  }
  .free-estimate-wrap,
  .areas-layout,
  #why{
    max-width:1220px;
    margin-inline:auto;
  }
  #why{
    width:100%;
  }
}

/* Premium card depth */
.hero-phone-card,
.hero-kitchen-badge,
.free-estimate-card,
.areas-panel,
.tcard,
.scard,
.why-logo-panel{
  transition:
    transform .28s var(--ease),
    box-shadow .28s var(--ease),
    border-color .28s var(--ease),
    background-color .28s var(--ease);
}
.free-estimate-card:hover,
.areas-panel:hover,
.tcard:hover,
.scard:hover{
  transform:translate3d(0,-3px,0);
  box-shadow:0 26px 74px rgba(49,20,34,.10);
}

/* Better CTA hierarchy */
.btn-p,
.btn-o,
.btn-w,
.btn-wl,
.nav-cta{
  white-space:nowrap;
}
.btn-p:focus-visible,
.btn-o:focus-visible,
.btn-w:focus-visible,
.btn-wl:focus-visible,
.nav-cta:focus-visible,
.mobile-sticky-btn:focus-visible{
  outline:3px solid rgba(224,82,127,.34);
  outline-offset:3px;
}

/* Trust bar premium spacing */
.trust{
  min-height:54px;
  box-shadow:0 8px 22px rgba(122,13,52,.08);
}
.ti{
  font-weight:700;
}

/* Free estimate section premium detail */
.free-estimate-sec{
  isolation:isolate;
}
.free-estimate-copy .st{
  max-width:690px;
}
.free-estimate-card{
  position:relative;
  overflow:hidden;
}
.free-estimate-card::before{
  content:"";
  position:absolute;
  top:-80px;
  right:-80px;
  width:170px;
  height:170px;
  border-radius:50%;
  background:rgba(224,82,127,.075);
  pointer-events:none;
}
.estimate-step{
  position:relative;
  z-index:1;
}

/* Desktop footer premium */
@media(min-width:769px){
  footer{
    position:relative;
    overflow:hidden;
  }
  footer::before{
    content:"";
    position:absolute;
    right:-12%;
    top:-70%;
    width:42%;
    height:170%;
    border-radius:50%;
    background:rgba(224,82,127,.055);
    pointer-events:none;
  }
  .foot-inner,
  .foot-bottom{
    position:relative;
    z-index:1;
  }
}

  .nav{

      radial-gradient(circle at 15% 12%,rgba(224,82,127,.10),transparent 28%),

  }
  .hero-v2-btns{
    margin-top:4px;
  }
  .hero-kitchen-frame{
    order:2;

  }
  .hero-scroll{
    display:none;

  .trust{

  .trust::-webkit-scrollbar{
    display:none;

    flex:0 0 auto;
  }

  .sec-eye{
    line-height:1.4;
  }

    letter-spacing:-.9px;
  }
  p.ss,
  .free-estimate-note,
  .cta-sub{
    font-size:.96rem;
  }

  .free-estimate-sec{
    background:linear-gradient(180deg,#fff 0%,#fff8fb 100%);
  }
  .estimate-card-badge{
    font-size:.62rem;
  }
  .estimate-step span{
    font-size:1.35rem;
    min-width:32px;
  }

    font-size:.96rem;

  .sgrid,
  .tgrid,

    border-radius:24px;
    overflow:hidden;
  }
  .scard,

  .stats{
    gap:1px;

  .stat-i{
    background:rgba(255,255,255,.035);
    border-radius:18px;

    align-items:center;

  .areas-panel{
    border-radius:24px;
    box-shadow:0 18px 44px rgba(49,20,34,.08);
  }

    min-height:54px;
  }

  .cta-sec{
    padding-bottom:78px;
  }

  }

  .mobile-sticky-cta{

    padding:10px;

@media(min-width:769px){
  .mobile-sticky-cta{
    display:none;
  }
}

/* Extra small phones */
@media(max-width:390px){
  .nav-logo-name{
    font-size:1rem;
  }
  .nav-logo-tag{
    font-size:.5rem;
    letter-spacing:1.8px;
  }
  .hero-v2 .hero-title{
    font-size:2.85rem;
  }

    font-size:1.78rem;
  }
  .hero-kitchen-frame{
    min-height:285px;
  }
  .mobile-sticky-cta{
    grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;
    left:8px;
    right:8px;
    bottom:8px;
  }
  .mobile-sticky-btn{
    font-size:.66rem;
    letter-spacing:1.2px;
  }
}

/* Motion safety without killing the premium feel */
@media(prefers-reduced-motion:reduce){
  .hero-kitchen-photo,
  .hero-phone-card,
  .hero-kitchen-frame,
  .free-estimate-card,
  .areas-panel,
  .tcard,
  .scard{
    transition:none!important;
    transform:none!important;
  }
}


/* === FINAL PERFORMANCE CURATION — mantém efeitos, deixa mais fluido === */
html,body{
  overflow-x:hidden;
}
img{
  content-visibility:auto;
}
.rv{
  will-change:opacity,transform;
  transform:translate3d(0,12px,0);
}
.rv.in{
  will-change:auto;
}
.hero-kitchen-photo,
.hero-kitchen-frame,
.hero-phone-card,
.free-estimate-card,
.areas-panel,
.tcard,
.scard,
.why-logo-panel,
.btn-p,
.btn-o,
.btn-w,
.btn-wl,
.nav-cta{
  transform:translateZ(0);
  backface-visibility:hidden;
}
@media (hover:none){
  .hero-kitchen-frame:hover .hero-kitchen-photo,
  .hero-phone-card:hover,
  .hero-kitchen-frame:hover,
  .free-estimate-card:hover,
  .areas-panel:hover,
  .tcard:hover,
  .scard:hover{
    transform:none!important;
  }
}
@media (max-width:720px){
  *{
    -webkit-tap-highlight-color:rgba(158,18,68,.08);
  }
  .hero-kitchen-photo{
    transform:none!important;
  }
  .hero-kitchen-frame,
  .free-estimate-card,
  .areas-panel,
  .tcard,
  .scard,
  .why-logo-panel{
    box-shadow:0 14px 34px rgba(49,20,34,.08);
  }
}


/* === CTA FLOATING FOOTER DISABLED — curadoria UX ===
   Motivo: no mobile estava redundante com os CTAs do footer e atrapalhando a leitura.
   CTAs normais do site continuam ativos. */
.sticky-cta,
.mobile-sticky,
.float-cta,
.floating-cta,
.bottom-cta,
.mobile-bottom-cta,
.cta-floating,
.sticky-actions,
.footer-floating,
.fixed-cta,
[class*="sticky-cta"],
[class*="floating-cta"],
[class*="mobile-sticky"],
[class*="bottom-cta"]{
  display:none!important;
  visibility:hidden!important;
  pointer-events:none!important;
}
body{padding-bottom:0!important;}



/* ═══ BEFORE & AFTER GALLERY ═══ */
#transformations{background:var(--rose);padding:96px 72px}
.ba-head{max-width:760px;margin:0 auto 46px;text-align:center}
.ba-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(2,minmax(0,1fr));gap:26px}
.ba-card{background:var(--white);border:1px solid var(--border);overflow:hidden;box-shadow:0 18px 44px rgba(49,20,34,.05);transition:transform .28s ease, box-shadow .28s ease, border-color .28s ease}
.ba-card:hover{transform:translateY(-6px);box-shadow:0 26px 52px rgba(49,20,34,.10);border-color:rgba(158,18,68,.16)}
.ba-media{position:relative;aspect-ratio:4/3;overflow:hidden;background:#f7eef2}
.ba-media img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;display:block;transition:transform .5s ease}
.ba-card:hover .ba-media img{transform:scale(1.02)}
.ba-badge{position:absolute;left:18px;top:18px;display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;padding:8px 12px;border-radius:999px;background:rgba(17,17,17,.72);backdrop-filter:blur(10px);color:#fff;font-size:.64rem;letter-spacing:1.7px;text-transform:uppercase;font-weight:700;z-index:2}
.ba-badge span{display:inline-flex;width:6px;height:6px;border-radius:50%;background:#ff7ca7}
.ba-body{padding:22px 22px 20px}
.ba-meta{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;gap:16px;margin-bottom:10px}
.ba-title{font-family:var(--ff);font-size:1.34rem;line-height:1.06;color:var(--text)}
.ba-tag{font-size:.62rem;letter-spacing:1.9px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--cr);font-weight:700;white-space:nowrap}
.ba-copy{font-size:.81rem;line-height:1.82;color:var(--muted);font-weight:300}
.ba-note{margin-top:16px;padding-top:14px;border-top:1px solid var(--border);font-size:.70rem;line-height:1.75;color:var(--muted2);font-style:italic}

@media(max-width:1024px){
  #transformations{padding:84px 48px}
}
@media(max-width:768px){
  #transformations{padding:74px 22px}
  .ba-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;gap:18px}
  .ba-body{padding:18px 18px 16px}
  .ba-meta{flex-direction:column;align-items:flex-start;gap:6px}
  .ba-title{font-size:1.16rem}
  .ba-copy{font-size:.8rem;line-height:1.75}
}


/* === FINAL QA UX LAYER === */
html{scroll-behavior:smooth}
body{min-height:100%;overflow-x:hidden}
a,button{touch-action:manipulation}
img{max-width:100%;height:auto}
.nav-back,.btn-home{cursor:pointer}
@media(max-width:768px){
  .nav-back{min-height:38px;display:inline-flex;align-items:center}
  .ba-media{aspect-ratio:4/3}
}


/* === FAILSAFE ASSET + UX QA LAYER === */

body{overflow-x:hidden}
img{max-width:100%;height:auto}
a,button{touch-action:manipulation}

<p class="ss rv d2">From weekly upkeep to intensive deep cleans — a service designed for every home and schedule.</p>
<div class="sgrid">

<div class="scard-bar"></div>
<div class="scard-lbl">Service 01</div>
<div class="sico"><svg fill="none" height="19" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" viewbox="0 0 24 24" width="19"><path d="M3 9l9-7 9 7v11a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H5a2 2 0 0 1-2-2z"></path></svg></div>

<script>
const nav=document.getElementById("nav");let ly=0;
window.addEventListener("scroll",()=>{const y=window.scrollY;nav.classList.toggle("sc",y>60);nav.classList.toggle("hd",y>ly&&y>280);ly=y;},{passive:true});
const hbg=document.getElementById("hbg"),mob=document.getElementById("mob");
hbg.addEventListener("click",()=>{hbg.classList.toggle("on");mob.classList.toggle("on");document.body.style.overflow=mob.classList.contains("on")?"hidden":"";});
mob.querySelectorAll("a").forEach(a=>a.addEventListener("click",()=>{hbg.classList.remove("on");mob.classList.remove("on");document.body.style.overflow="";}));
const revealEls=[...document.querySelectorAll(".rv")];

const revealNow=(el)=>{
  if(!el.classList.contains("in")){
    el.classList.add("in");
  }
};

const isNearViewport=(el,offset=260)=>{
  const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();
  return r.top < window.innerHeight + offset && r.bottom > -offset;
};

const obs=new IntersectionObserver(entries=>{
  entries.forEach(entry=>{
    if(entry.isIntersecting){
      revealNow(entry.target);
      obs.unobserve(entry.target);
    }
  });
},{
  threshold:0.01,
  rootMargin:"0px 0px 280px 0px"
});

revealEls.forEach(el=>{
  if(isNearViewport(el,320)){
    revealNow(el);
  }else{
    obs.observe(el);
  }
});

window.addEventListener("load",()=>{
  revealEls.forEach(el=>{
    if(isNearViewport(el,360)){
      revealNow(el);
      try{obs.unobserve(el)}catch(e){}
    }
  });
},{once:true});

const countTargets=[...document.querySelectorAll(".why-badge-n, .stat-n")];
const animateCount=(el)=>{
  if(el.dataset.counted==="1") return;
  el.dataset.counted="1";
  const original=(el.dataset.original||el.textContent).trim();
  el.dataset.original=original;
  const numeric=parseInt(original.replace(/[^\d]/g,""),10);
  if(Number.isNaN(numeric)) return;
  const prefix=(original.match(/^[^\d]+/)||[""])[0];
  const suffix=(original.match(/[^\d]+$/)||[""])[0];
  const duration=1600;
  const start=performance.now();
  const step=(now)=>{
    const progress=Math.min((now-start)/duration,1);
    const eased=1-Math.pow(1-progress,3);
    const current=Math.round(numeric*eased);
    el.textContent=`${prefix}${current}${suffix}`;
    if(progress<1) requestAnimationFrame(step);
    else el.textContent=original;
  };
  requestAnimationFrame(step);
};
const countObserver=new IntersectionObserver(entries=>{
  entries.forEach(entry=>{
    if(entry.isIntersecting){
      animateCount(entry.target);
      countObserver.unobserve(entry.target);
    }
  });
},{threshold:.45});
countTargets.forEach(el=>countObserver.observe(el));

</script>

</div>
<script>
document.addEventListener("click", function(e){
  const smsLink = e.target.closest('a[href^="sms:"]');
  if(!smsLink) return;

  window.m4yPushEvent && window.m4yPushEvent("click_to_text", {
    click_url: smsLink.getAttribute("href"),
    click_text: (smsLink.textContent || "").trim(),
    page_path: window.location.pathname
  });
});
</script>
